outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: uses modelled target language to share information in familiar contexts

outcomes.name: Responding
outcomes.description: recognises and responds to key words and known phrases in texts

outcomes.name: Composing
outcomes.description: composes texts in the target language using modelled language

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: recognises relationships between languages and cultures

outcomes.name: Language awareness and building
outcomes.description: recognises resources available to maintain, revive and strengthen Aboriginal Languages

outcomes.name: Interacting in Auslan
outcomes.description: exchanges meaning in guided interactions using high-frequency signs and common protocols

outcomes.name: Understanding texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: identifies key information in simple texts and responds in a variety of ways

outcomes.name: Creating texts in Auslan
outcomes.description: creates simple informative and imaginative texts on known topics using high-frequency signs

outcomes.name: Role of language, culture and identity
outcomes.description: identifies ways of communicating which reflect culture

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: recognises and responds to information to demonstrate understanding of simple texts with modelled language

outcomes.name: Intercultural understanding
outcomes.description: identifies aspects of the target language and culture, and their own language(s) and culture(s)

outcomes.name: Dance
outcomes.description: composes and performs dance using shapes and movements to communicate ideas, and describes ways that dance conveys ideas

outcomes.name: Drama
outcomes.description: makes and performs drama to embody and enact characters, ideas and stories, and describes ways that drama communicates ideas

outcomes.name: Music
outcomes.description: performs, uses listening skills and composes to communicate ideas through sound, and describes ways musical ideas are conveyed

outcomes.name: Visual Arts
outcomes.description: makes artworks using materials and techniques to represent subject matter and ideas, and describes ways artists convey ideas in artworks

outcomes.name: Oral language and communication
outcomes.description: communicates effectively by using interpersonal conventions and language to extend and elaborate ideas for social and learning interactions

outcomes.name: Vocabulary
outcomes.description: understands and effectively uses Tier 1, taught Tier 2 and Tier 3 vocabulary to extend and elaborate ideas

outcomes.name: Phonic knowledge
outcomes.description: uses initial and extended phonics, including vowel digraphs, trigraphs to decode and encode words when reading and creating texts

outcomes.name: Reading fluency
outcomes.description: sustains reading unseen texts with automaticity and prosody and self-corrects errors

outcomes.name: Reading comprehension
outcomes.description: comprehends independently read texts that require sustained reading by activating background and word knowledge, connecting and understanding sentences and whole text, and monitoring for meaning

outcomes.name: Creating written texts
outcomes.description: plans, creates and revises texts written for different purposes, including paragraphs, using knowledge of vocabulary, text features and sentence structure

outcomes.name: Spelling
outcomes.description: applies phonological, orthographic and morphological generalisations and strategies when spelling words in a range of writing contexts

outcomes.name: Handwriting
outcomes.description: uses a legible, fluent and automatic handwriting style, and digital technology, including word‑processing applications, when creating texts

outcomes.name: Understanding and responding to literature
outcomes.description: understands and responds to literature by creating texts using similar structures, intentional language choices and features appropriate to audience and purpose

subjects.name: Human Society and its Environment
subjects.description: Learning area for Human Society and its Environment

outcomes.name: Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander histories and cultures
outcomes.description: describes interactions between Aboriginal Peoples and Country

outcomes.name: Geography
outcomes.description: describes ways people connect to and care for places, water environments and each other, using geographical information

outcomes.name: History
outcomes.description: describes the ancient past and changes in communication over time, using stories, images, objects and sites as evidence

outcomes.name: Working mathematically
outcomes.description: develops understanding and fluency in mathematics through exploring and connecting mathematical concepts, choosing and applying mathematical techniques to solve problems, and communicating their thinking and reasoning coherently and clearly

outcomes.name: Representing whole numbers
outcomes.description: applies an understanding of place value and the role of zero to read, write and order two‑ and three‑digit numbers

outcomes.name: Representing whole numbers
outcomes.description: reasons about representations of whole numbers to 1000, partitioning numbers to use and record quantity values

outcomes.name: Combining and separating quantities
outcomes.description: uses number bonds and the relationship between addition and subtraction to solve problems involving partitioning

outcomes.name: Forming groups
outcomes.description: uses the structure of equal groups to solve multiplication problems, and shares or groups to solve division problems

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: represents and describes the positions of objects in familiar locations

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: measures, records, compares and estimates lengths and distances using uniform informal units, as well as metres and centimetres

outcomes.name: Geometric measure
outcomes.description: creates and recognises halves, quarters and eighths as part measures of a whole length

outcomes.name: Two‑dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: recognises, describes and represents shapes including quadrilaterals and other common polygons

outcomes.name: Two‑dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: measures and compares areas using uniform informal units in rows and columns

outcomes.name: Three‑dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: recognises, describes and represents familiar three‑dimensional objects

outcomes.name: Three‑dimensional spatial structure
outcomes.description: measures, records, compares and estimates internal volumes (capacities) and volumes using uniform informal units

outcomes.name: Non‑spatial measure
outcomes.description: measures, records, compares and estimates the masses of objects using uniform informal units

outcomes.name: Non‑spatial measure
outcomes.description: describes, compares and orders durations of events, and reads half‑ and quarter‑hour time

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: gathers and organises data, displays data in lists, tables and picture graphs

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: reasons about representations of data to describe and interpret the results

outcomes.name: Chance
outcomes.description: recognises and describes the element of chance in everyday events

outcomes.name: Interacting
outcomes.description: exchanges meaning by selecting culturally appropriate modelled language

outcomes.name: Understanding texts
outcomes.description: recognises and responds to information in simple texts to demonstrate understanding

outcomes.name: Creating texts
outcomes.description: creates simple texts by selecting culturally appropriate modelled language

subjects.name: Personal Development, Health and Physical Education
subjects.description: Learning area for Personal Development, Health and Physical Education

outcomes.name: Movement skill and physical activity
outcomes.description: demonstrates fundamental movement skills and fair play in physical activities

outcomes.name: Respectful relationships and safety
outcomes.description: describes and demonstrates actions that support respectful relationships and safety offline and online

outcomes.name: Identity, health and wellbeing
outcomes.description: describes factors that contribute to identity, health and wellbeing

outcomes.name: Self‑management and interpersonal skills
outcomes.description: describes and demonstrates self‑management and interpersonal skills in a range of contexts

subjects.name: Science and Technology
subjects.description: Learning area for Science and Technology

outcomes.name: Science
outcomes.description: measures and describes changes in living things, materials, movement, Earth and the sky

outcomes.name: Planning and conducting investigations
outcomes.description: poses questions based on observations and information to investigate cause and effect

outcomes.name: Data
outcomes.description: collects, represents and uses data to identify patterns and relationships

outcomes.name: Design and digital technologies
outcomes.description: uses technologies and materials to design and make products to address user needs or opportunities
